reminder.notes:
Reminder v2.19.38

### Features
- Redesigned location picker with an interactive map. Pan the map under the pin, watch a circle show the exact geofence radius as you drag the slider, search for any address, and tap the button to jump to your current location. No account or setup needed.

### Bug fixes
- The location picker map now works out of the box with no setup, replacing the previous map that could render blank tiles.

ai-scanner.notes:
# AI Scanner 1.3.2 — ask search in plain language

Search now understands everyday questions, plus two visible fixes.

### Features

- Natural-language search. Type a question the way you'd say it -- "how much do I owe Raj", "wifi password", "thyroid medicine" -- and AI Scanner picks out the meaningful words and finds the right screenshots, matching across both the on-screen text and the AI note. It ignores filler words like "how", "the" and "my".
- Better ranking. Results are ordered by how well they match your words, so the most relevant screenshot comes first. This works alongside the related-results and the AI answer at the top.

### Bug fixes

- Fixed the scan folder name showing one letter per line in Settings.
- Fixed the refresh message being almost invisible -- it was using a dark colour on a dark background.

mirrordrive.notes:
# MirrorDrive 0.13.2

### Features
- No new features. This release fixes the in-app updater and one playback behavior.

### Bug fixes
- The in-app update check now actually works on a real phone. It previously gave up after 8 seconds while the network request itself could take up to 20, so on a normal mobile connection the check was abandoned before it finished and the update prompt never appeared. The check is now non-blocking: the app opens immediately and the update screen appears as soon as a new version is found.
- Deleting a file that is currently playing now stops playback at the same time, instead of continuing to play a file that no longer exists.

twinclean.notes: Diagnostic fix: the 'Connect Google Drive' failure path now shows the real underlying error instead of a generic message, so sign-in issues can actually be diagnosed. No feature changes.

localsender.notes:
Local Sender 1.0.4 - encrypted Google Drive backup and restore

Back up everything to your own Google account and restore it on any device,
end-to-end encrypted. Pairs with 1.0.3 - no need to re-pair.

### Features
- Google Drive backup in Settings: your chats, rooms, device profiles, trusted
  devices and app settings are sealed on your device with AES-256-GCM before
  they ever leave it, then stored in your Google account's private app area.
- Restore on any device by signing in with the same Google account. Your device
  keeps its own identity key, so already-paired devices stay recognised.
- One account, many devices: the same Google ID backs up every device
  independently - each device keeps its own identity, only your data is shared.
- Backup is "Google sign-in only": no separate password to remember or lose.

### Bug fixes
- The backup key lives in your account's private app-data area, which no other
  app and no website can read; Google Drive only ever holds an unreadable blob.
- Nothing about your device identity or pairing secrets is ever uploaded.
